evidence.scientific_clarity: All 4 panels match brief requirements; concept diagram, ablation, convergence, and heatmap panels clearly present and readable.
evidence.typography: DejaVu Sans explicitly hardcoded in panel label kwargs; no pdf.fonttype=42 set anywhere in gen_figure.py.
evidence.palette: RdYlGn heatmap colormap is not colorblind-safe (red-green); line/bar colors are ColorBrewer-derived and more accessible.
evidence.layout_density: Good overall density with full-width Panel D; minor excess whitespace at top of Panel A concept diagram.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure with numerical claim (64.7%); RdYlGn colormap likely to draw color-accessibility comment from reviewers.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF created by Matplotlib but no pdf.fonttype=42 set; text stored as Type3 non-selectable outlines rather than embedded TrueType.
evidence.file_format: All required files present and non-trivial: figure.pdf (53K), figure.png (310K), caption.tex (948B), gen_figure.py (10K); bonus figure.svg also present.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption explains each panel, includes numerical claim (64.7%), identifies specific finding (high scores cluster near S3-S4), notes Panel A is illustrative.

overall_strengths: All required files present with complete 4-panel layout matching the brief exactly
Caption is detailed with specific numerical claims and findings per panel
overall_weaknesses: DejaVu Sans explicitly hardcoded and no pdf.fonttype=42 → non-editable PDF text (Type3 fonts)
RdYlGn colormap in Panel D heatmap is not colorblind-safe due to red-green confusion
